skill-base.description: How to create, maintain, and distribute AI agent skills. Use when creating new skills, updating existing ones, or setting up skill infrastructure in a project.

business-analysis.description: Фреймворки бизнес-анализа перед проектом — JTBD, Lean Canvas, Value Proposition Canvas. Use when conducting Discovery sessions, formulating outcome-oriented offers, or analyzing client business models.

client-communication.description: Outcome-ориентированная коммуникация с клиентом — Discovery-звонки, статусы, презентация результатов. Use when preparing for client meetings, writing status updates, or presenting project results.

custom-formatting.description: How to use ESLint v9 Flat Config with @stylistic/eslint-plugin to enforce custom padding (like 3 blank lines after imports) instead of Prettier. Use when configuring or fixing formatting rules in this workspace.

express-v5.description: How to use Express v5 — async errors, removed APIs, path syntax, middleware. Use when building HTTP servers with Express.

figma-api.description: How to extract design data from Figma REST API — tokens, SVG icons, images, layout specs. Use when setting up design-to-code pipeline or updating design assets from Figma.

monorepo-conventions.description: Monorepo structure, tooling conventions, and development practices for the ivannikov-pro-platform. Use when adding packages, configuring builds, or understanding project architecture.

node-app-config.description: How to add and use @ivannikov-pro/app-config — convict-based config with dotenv, schema validation. Use when adding configuration management to a package.

node-app-logger.description: How to add and use @ivannikov-pro/app-logger — log4js-based logging with convict integration. Use when adding logging to a package.

outcome-pricing.description: Value-based pricing — ценообразование на основе бизнес-результата, а не часов работы. Use when preparing commercial proposals, justifying project costs, or switching from hourly to value-based pricing.

pnpm-workspaces.description: How to use pnpm workspaces — workspace protocol, filter, publishing. Use when managing workspace dependencies or packages.

solidity-contracts.description: Conventions and architecture for Solidity smart contracts in this project (packages/contracts). Covers contract structure, standards, tooling, and deployment patterns. Use when writing, reviewing, or deploying Solidity code.

tsup.description: How to use tsup — zero-config TypeScript bundler powered by esbuild. Use when bundling TypeScript packages or configuring build output.

turborepo.description: How to use Turborepo — monorepo build system with task caching and dependency graph. Use when configuring or running monorepo tasks.

architecture.description: How to keep the architecture document (docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) up to date after making changes

as-blockchain.description: Act as Blockchain / Smart Contract Engineer — Solidity, Foundry, gas optimization, indexer-awareness

as-cto.description: Act as CTO / Tech Lead — architecture, code review, risk assessment, standards

as-fullstack.description: Act as Full-Stack Developer — end-to-end features across contracts, backend, frontend, and infrastructure

as-qa.description: Act as QA / Test Engineer — testing strategy, test coverage, regression detection

as-security.description: Act as Security Engineer — audit contracts, API security, vulnerabilities, OWASP

coding-style.description: Coding style preferences for all code in this project

contracts-deploy.description: How to deploy smart contracts to local/testnet/mainnet

contracts-test.description: How to build and test smart contracts with Foundry

dev.description: How to start the full development environment

discovery.description: Discovery процесс — глубокое погружение в бизнес клиента перед началом проекта

find-docs.description: How to look up library documentation using Context7 MCP

gas-report.description: How to generate a gas usage report for smart contracts

lint.description: How to lint all packages in the monorepo

notify-telegram.description: How and when to send Telegram notifications via the ai-notify-tg MCP server

project-brief.description: Outcome-first бриф проекта — начинается с бизнес-целей, а не с ТЗ

proposal.description: Генерация outcome-ориентированного коммерческого предложения для клиента

svg-to-icon.description: How to convert an inline SVG or raw SVG file from Figma into a compliant React component in @ivannikov-pro/ui/src/icons

ai-notify-tg.description: Telegram notification service for AI coding assistants
